speaker: Seeker
text: Endurance dikhani padti hai, warna 70 saal ki umar mein bedridden pati ko kaun sambhalega. Doctor bas stress bolke bhej dete hain, par ghar ka poora bojh mere kandhon par hai. Bacche shehar mein hain, unko lagta hai yeh mera farz hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se duty aur farz ka frame mirror karna taaki seeker ko role-based pressure suna hua lage.
text: Aap us zimmedari mein phansi hui lag rahi hain jahan farz nibhana hi pehla kaam ban gaya hai, chahe aap kitni bhi thak chuki hon.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, rukne ka option hi nahi hai. Subah se raat tak seva, dawa, khana, safai sab mujhe karna padta hai. Andar se toot rahi hoon par lagta hai farz nibhana hi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D use karke lagataar chal rahe pressure ka duration mirror karna bina solution rush kiye.
text: Kaafi arse se aap bina rukke yeh cycle chala rahi hain, isliye thakan layer by layer jama hoti gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur jab body dard karti hai tab bhi kaam rok nahi paati. Dimag mein bas yahi chalta rehta hai ki endurance dikhani padti hai tabhi ghar sambhalega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatement ke baad ek grounded sawaal puchna taaki sabse bhaari pal identify ho sake.
text: Din ke kis waqt aapko sabse zyada lagta hai ki ab sharir saath nahi de raha?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shaam mein jab unki tabiyat bigadti hai aur ek saath 4 kaam aa jate hain tab lagta hai saans atak rahi hai. Uss waqt mann karta hai baith jaun, par lagta hai mere liye rukna mana hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se implied fear mirror karna aur mild risk pe warm normalising line dena.
text: Yeh sunke dil bhaari ho gaya. Shaam ke us pal mein aapko darr lagta hai ki agar aap dheemi pad gayin toh unki tabiyat aur ghar dono bigad jayenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kahun toh main akeli pad gayi hoon. Bacchon ka support phone tak hai, ground pe koi nahi. Mujhe lagta hai mere paas sach mein koi sahara nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C7 duty context mein unke andar ki exhaustion aur akelapan ko softly naam dena.
text: Lagta hai aap bahut exhausted hain, aur saath mein yeh bhi mehsoos ho raha hai ki itni badi zimmedari akele uthate-uthate aap khud ko adrishya samajhne lagi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur jab main kehti hoon ki thak gayi hoon toh mujhe hi kamzor samjha jata hai. Fir main chup ho jati hoon aur apne aap ko bolti hoon endurance dikhani padti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Unki thakan ko Indian elder-care reality se jodkar validate karna aur worth ko output se alag rakhna.
text: Is age mein full-time caregiving karte hue thakna bilkul natural hai, khaaskar jab parivaar sheharon mein alag ho aur daily help stable na ho. Aapki keemat sirf is baat se decide nahi hoti ki aap din bhar kitna kaam kar pa rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kabhi lagta hai kisi se khul ke bolun, par dar lagta hai log bolenge budhape mein dimaag kamzor ho gaya. Mujhe aise labels se bahut ghabrahat hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke turant baad chhota restatement dena, bina sawaal ke emotional safety maintain karna.
text: Aapko darr hai ki log samajhne ke bajay thappa laga denge, isliye aap apni baat andar hi rok leti hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, sahi samjha aapne. Main tootna nahi chahti, bas samajhna chahti hoon ab kya karoon jisse seva bhi chale aur main bhi na girun. Endurance dikhani padti hai, par shayad koi behtar tareeka ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness signal pe duty-compatible 3 micro options dena jo 10 min se kam ho aur nayi obligation na banaye.
text: Bilkul, teen chhote options try kar sakti hain: (1) har dawa ke baad 2 minute kursi par seedha baith ke 8 gehri saansein, (2) subah ek kaam kam karke sirf zaroori kaam list karna, (3) bacchon ko roz 5 minute ka fixed call jisme bas aaj ka ek practical support point batana. Teeno mein se jo halka lage, wahi uthaiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe pehla aur teesra option manageable lag raha hai. Saans wala break shayad ho jaye, aur bacchon se fixed baat karna bhi theek hai. Thoda lag raha hai sambhal sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek suggestion ko step-by-step execute karwana taaki immediate implementation simple bane.
text: Pehle yeh karo: aaj raat agle din ki dawa time ke paas ek chhota kagaz chipka do - "2 min saans". Phir kal jab pehli baar dawa do, turant baithkar 8 slow breaths lo, bas count karo. Phir shaam mein bacchon ko ek line bolo: "Roz 8 baje 5 min call chahiye practical help note ke liye." Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh steps clear hain, isliye mushkil nahi lag rahe. Jab cheez chhoti ho toh karna aasaan lagta hai. Main aaj hi kagaz chipka dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe dena ki caregiving fatigue structural hai, personal kami nahi.
text: Ek baat yaad rakhiye: long-term caregiving mein thakan personal weakness nahi hoti, yeh structure ka load hota hai jab ek hi vyakti par medical aur ghar dono zimmedari aa jati hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke halka laga ki shayad meri hi galti nahi hai. Main har cheez perfect karne ke chakkar mein khud ko hi daantti rehti thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ki self-blame ko soften karna aur unki worth ko caregiving output se alag reinforce karna.
text: Aap jo mehsoos kar rahi hain woh bilkul samajhne layak hai. Itna saara kaam ek saath sambhalte hue slip hona insaani baat hai, aur aapki izzat ya keemat isse kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main kal se do minute wala break pakka karungi. Agar yeh chal gaya toh shayad din ka pace thoda control mein aa jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do aur optional micro-support ideas dena jo routine mein fit ho aur burden na badhaye.
text: Agar aap chahein toh do aur light cheezein rakh sakti hain: (1) paani ka glass wahi rakhein jahan dawa deti hain, taaki aapka hydration miss na ho, (2) roz ek baar khud se line bolna - "aaj main jitna kar paayi, utna kaafi hai". Bas optional hai, pressure nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Paani wala point practical hai, woh main turant kar sakti hoon. Aur woh line bolna bhi theek hai, shayad self-daant thodi kam ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar systemic anecdote dekar normalize karna ki elder caregiving load common hai aur log khulkar bolte nahi.
text: Ghar mein elder-care role mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - bahar se sab normal dikhate hain, lekin andar se bahut log isi tarah tootne ke kareeb pahunchte hain, sirf koi bolta nahi kyunki farz aur izzat ka pressure zyada hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke lag raha hai main akeli nahi hoon. Pehle bas guilt aata tha, ab thoda samajh aa raha hai ki yeh haalat ka bojh hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Relief ko mirror karna taaki naya balanced narrative consolidate ho.
text: Ab aap guilt se thoda bahar aakar yeh dekh pa rahi hain ki bojh aap par zyada tha, kami aap mein nahi thi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab main pace dheema rakhungi par kaam chhodungi nahi. Shayad isi balance ki zarurat thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second and final systemic info dekar reinforce karna ki sustainable caregiving long run mein patient ko bhi support karta hai.
text: Sustainable pace rakhna patient care ke liye bhi better hota hai, kyunki caregiver stable rahega toh routine zyada lambe time tak bina break ke chal pata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, ab pattern samajh aaya. Main agar bilkul hi khud ko ignore karungi toh kal ko seva bhi nahi kar paungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Action ko concrete karne ke liye ek focused check-in sawaal puchna.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

text: Bahut badhiya. Bas do continuation points rakhiye: (1) raat ko 1 line likhiye - "kal ka pehla step", (2) bacchon ke call mein sirf ek specific madad point boliye. Itna hi enough hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main yeh dono karungi. Ab lag raha hai dheere dheere sambhal jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dharma nibhana hi padega, warna dementia wale pati ko kaun sambhalega. Doctor bolte hain BP sirf stress se hai, par unko kya pata ghar ka poora din ka bojh kya hota hai. Joint family mein log kya kahenge ka darr alag se rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main yeh dono karungi. Ab lag raha hai dheere-dheere sambhal jayega.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D use karke long-term nonstop load ka duration reflect karna.
